# Recitation for COMP 110

<!-- This is a comment. Below, you'll see code for inserting an image. To make this image appear, update <custom-path>. To add an image, save it inside the imgs folder of this repository. -->
<img src="<custom-path>/static/imgs/logo.png" alt="Image of Comp110 rainbow logo. "  width="500"/>

## Overview
This is a project that is based on a survery that collected information on students feelings about COMP 110 as a course.  

## Our Idea
With this data, we came up with ideas on how the course can be improved for future students, and decided that the addition of a recitation could be beneficial.

## Main Findings
We found that many students reported attending office hours and tutoring zero times.
Many students also rated the class difficulty to be relatively high and said the class was fast paced as well, with a lower understanding of the course content. 
For the students who did attend office hours and tutoring, they deemed it to be helpful, it is just not a widely used resource on average amoung the students taking the class.

## Improvements for future surveys
It would be helpful for further analysis to send out a survey on why student don't attend office hours and tutoring, so that we can explore and see if adding a recitation is the correct fix for the lack of usage by students. 

## Conclusion
Overall, we also think that office hours could be helpful for students who don't feel comfterable going to office hours or can't find time in their schedules to fit it in. If this will help students to learn the material better it is definitely worth a try and based on the data, it seems to show that it could definitly be helpful in improving students confidence and comfterability with the COMP 110 material.
